title: GapDetection Output
description: Structured output from gap-detection skill execution

summary.description: Counts of detected gaps per category

noReadme.description: Number of source files in dirs without README

noTest.description: Number of source files without corresponding test files

noDoc.description: Number of exported symbols without documentation comments

reportPath.description: Absolute path where the full report was written

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the scan was executed

priorityGaps.description: Top priority gaps ranked by blast radius
